summary: Completed comprehensive testing of AI Village MVP storytelling experience. All core features working perfectly including dark fantasy UI, character creation, AI chat integration with GPT-5.2, and village exploration.
passed_tests: ✅ Backend API: All 9 endpoints working (100% success rate)
✅ AI Integration: GPT-5.2 generating rich narrative responses via Emergent LLM
✅ Landing page: Dark fantasy theme with 'Enter The Echoes' button
✅ Character creation: Name, background templates, trait selection (up to 3)
✅ Village Explorer: Loads with character data and 6 location sidebar
✅ Chat functionality: AI storyteller responds to user messages immersively
✅ Location navigation: Seamless travel between village locations
✅ Global Dataspace: Page loads and shows memory statistics
✅ Character persistence: Created characters saved and loaded properly
✅ UI/UX: Proper dark fantasy styling with gold accents and atmospheric imagery
